items.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue
items.summary: Jurors spent weeks hearing about Musk's claim that Altman had "stolen a charity."
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
items.summary: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

items.title: Disney faces a class action lawsuit over facial recognition tech
